title: [v5.4-rhel] Remove persist directory when cleaning up Conmon files
body:
This seems to have been added as part of the cleanup of our handling of OOM files, but code was never added to remove it, so we leaked a single directory with an exit file and OOM file per container run. Apparently have been doing this for a while - I'd guess since March of '23 - so I'm surprised more people didn't notice.

Fixes #25291

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-86544, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-86550

@StuartMcCarthy This here is targeted against podman 5.4 version.

If you need these fixes in older RHEL versions you need to requests backports via support. Pointing them at the upstream PR and linked RHEL issues might be enough.

@StuartMcCarthy, @Luap99 is correct.  However, this is your lucky day.  We had a request to fix this in OCP v4.17, which relies on Podman v5.2-rhel.  The fix is underway at: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25852
